creator: lioux@uol.com.br
text:
Could you please investigate why the distfile changed
without a version bump?
	It has been pointed to my attention that this is a very
important piece of information, specially to avoid trojan horses.
And, I agree that this is A Good Thing(TM).
	Also, developers are usually happy to bump version numbers
if good reasons are presented.

-- 
Mario S F Ferreira - UnB - Brazil - "I guess this is a signature."
lioux at ( freebsd dot org | linf dot unb dot br )
flames to beloved devnull@someotherworldbeloworabove.org
feature, n: a documented bug | bug, n: an undocumented feature
